hero.description: Automated, modular pick-up in store parcel systems for retail chains. We design, manufacture and deploy solutions tailored to the brand - from a master unit with a touchscreen to a scalable locker configuration with contactless pick-up in under 10 seconds.
hero.wdrazamyDla: We deploy for the biggest brands.

realizations.subtitle: PickUpWall deployed in beauty, fashion and electronics stores.
